headline: INNOVATING THE FRAME: THE AI PRODUCTION REVOLUTION
subtitle: AI Video Production News — Edition 003

stories.title: Sora Is Dead: Inside the $15M/Day Failure That Ended OpenAI's Video Dream
stories.summary: OpenAI shut down Sora on April 26, 2026 after burning $15M daily in compute against just $2.1M lifetime revenue. Downloads crashed 67%, Disney walked from a $1B deal, and active users dropped below 500K. The AI video market has matured into four sustainable tiers — Runway, Kling, Veo, and Pika — each with proven economics and clear use cases. If you're still building on Sora, the API shuts down September 24.
stories.alt: Crumbling server rack collapsing in dramatic light and smoke

stories.title: Alibaba's Mystery Model 'HappyHorse-1.0' Tops Every Global AI Video Benchmark
stories.summary: A model appeared anonymously on Artificial Analysis leaderboards and instantly hit #1 on both text-to-video and image-to-video blind tests — beating Kling 3.0, Veo 3.1, and Runway Gen-4. It was Alibaba. The ATH AI Innovation Unit confirmed it on Friday. China's AI video output is now arguably best-in-class, raising urgent questions about access, licensing, and what's coming next.
stories.alt: A luminous data-stream horse galloping through a dark digital void

stories.title: Avid and Google Cloud Forge Multi-Year AI Partnership — Gemini Coming to Media Composer
stories.summary: Announced at NAB Show 2026, Avid and Google Cloud have signed a multi-year deal to embed Gemini models and Vertex AI directly into Media Composer and Content Core — Avid's new cloud-native SaaS platform. The integration targets two high-value workflows: intelligent archive search (auto-tagging decades of footage so libraries become as searchable as the web) and AI-assisted editing (agentic tools that match styles, fill timelines, and handle heavy lifting so editors can focus on storytelling). Early adopters include Gray Media, Major League Baseball, NBCUniversal, and Canal+.
stories.alt: An editor at a professional Avid workstation with glowing AI-assisted timeline and cinematic studio lighting

stories.title: Adobe's NAB 2026 Salvo: Color Mode in Premiere, Kling 3.0 in Firefly, AI Assistant Across the Suite
stories.summary: Adobe's biggest creative update in years landed at NAB. Premiere gets a landmark Color Mode built from scratch — a direct challenge to DaVinci Resolve. The Firefly Video Editor adds Kling 3.0, Kling 3.0 Omni, Veo 3.1, and Runway Gen-4.5 to its 30+ model library. Frame.io Drive makes cloud assets feel local. A new Firefly AI Assistant creates one conversational workflow across Photoshop, Premiere, Lightroom, and Illustrator. 800M+ licensed stock assets also land inside Firefly.
stories.alt: A video editor at a dark workstation with holographic AI overlays glowing around the screens

stories.title: WGA Strikes Four-Year Deal With Hollywood: First-Ever AI Training Compensation Protections
stories.summary: The Writers Guild of America and AMPTP reached a four-year Minimum Basic Agreement on April 4 — the longest WGA contract in modern history. The headline win: studios must now compensate writers if their scripts are used to train AI. A $321M health plan infusion and higher streaming residuals round out the deal. This sets the legal and commercial precedent that will define AI rights negotiations across SAG-AFTRA, IATSE, and every creative guild that follows.
stories.alt: A vintage typewriter with a human hand at the keys and a robotic hand stopped by a barrier of golden light
